query:
SELECT
        COALESCE(SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN outcome = 'yes' AND side = 'buy'
                THEN (quantity / NULLIF(price, 0))
                ELSE 0
            END
        ), 0)::numeric AS yes_buy_qty,

        COALESCE(SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN outcome = 'yes' AND side = 'buy'
                THEN quantity
                ELSE 0
            END
        ), 0)::numeric AS yes_buy_usd,

        COALESCE(SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN outcome = 'yes' AND side = 'sell'
                THEN (quantity / NULLIF(price, 0))
                ELSE 0
            END
        ), 0)::numeric AS yes_sell_qty,

        COALESCE(SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN outcome = 'yes' AND side = 'sell'
                THEN quantity
                ELSE 0
            END
        ), 0)::numeric AS yes_sell_usd,

        COALESCE(SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN outcome = 'no' AND side = 'buy'
                THEN (quantity / NULLIF(price, 0))
                ELSE 0
            END
        ), 0)::numeric AS no_buy_qty,

        COALESCE(SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN outcome = 'no' AND side = 'buy'
                THEN quantity
                ELSE 0
            END
        ), 0)::numeric AS no_buy_usd,

        COALESCE(SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN outcome = 'no' AND side = 'sell'
                THEN (quantity / NULLIF(price, 0))
                ELSE 0
            END
        ), 0)::numeric AS no_sell_qty,

        COALESCE(SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN outcome = 'no' AND side = 'sell'
                THEN quantity
                ELSE 0
            END
        ), 0)::numeric AS no_sell_usd

    FROM polymarket.orders
    WHERE market_id = $1
      AND status = 'filled'::polymarket.order_status
